nodes.summary: bash -n syntax check on every result=merged .sh file; non-zero exit = hard failure
Symbol resolution check: function defs vs call sites, same file + depth-1 source; unresolved = gate failure
Each failure surfaces file path, symbol name, and line number
Gate integrated into upgrade_consumer_postcheck.py, runs before upgrade declared complete
Opt-out via BLUEPRINT_UPGRADE_SKIP_BEHAVIORAL_CHECK=true with mandatory warning
Postcheck JSON behavioral_check section: skipped, files_checked, syntax_errors, unresolved_symbols, status
behavioral-check-failure added to blocked_reasons on gate fail
Shell wrapper reads and forwards BLUEPRINT_UPGRADE_SKIP_BEHAVIORAL_CHECK
Shell wrapper emits blueprint_upgrade_postcheck_behavioral_check_failures_total metric
Grep/regex heuristic sufficient for MVP; no full shell parser required
Unit tests MUST include positive-path and negative-path fixtures
bash -n for syntax-only parsing; no execution of merged script content
Gate outcomes in postcheck JSON; behavioral_check_failures_total metric; log_warn on skip
Gate failure must not mutate working tree; opt-out is deterministic escape hatch; gate is idempotent
Failure output identifies file, symbol, and line; postcheck JSON is canonical CI/CD evidence
Syntax error in merged .sh => postcheck exits non-zero; file and error in behavioral_check.syntax_errors
Dropped function definition in merged .sh => postcheck exits non-zero; symbol in behavioral_check.unresolved_symbols
All merged .sh files pass => postcheck exits zero; behavioral_check.status = pass
BLUEPRINT_UPGRADE_SKIP_BEHAVIORAL_CHECK=true => zero exit; skipped=true; status=skipped; warning emitted
blocked_reasons contains behavioral-check-failure iff behavioral_check.status = fail
blueprint_upgrade_postcheck_behavioral_check_failures_total metric emitted with correct count
